description: Ground truth for evaluating AI lease agreement analysis output.

pdfs: How to Identify and Fix Illegal Lease Clauses.pdf

label_schema.unfair_but_legal: Legal but significantly disadvantages the tenant
label_schema.needs_negotiation: Standard but tenant should push back or clarify

severity_scale: 1 (minor inconvenience) to 10 (severe legal/financial risk to tenant)

clause_types.name: Waiver of Habitability Rights
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify any clause that attempts to waive the tenant's right to a habitable living condition.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it undermines the tenant's right to live in a safe and habitable unit.

clause_types.name: Eviction Without Judicial Process
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag any clause that allows eviction without following judicial procedures.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it denies tenants their right to due process.

clause_types.name: Acceleration of Rent Payments
key_indicators: waives landlord's duty to mitigate damages
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that require full rent payment immediately upon tenant default.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it violates the landlord's obligation to mitigate damages.

clause_types.name: Tenant Pays Landlord's Attorney Fees
key_indicators: tenant responsible for landlord's legal costs
tenant waives right to recover costs
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag any clause that requires tenants to pay the landlord's attorney fees.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it unfairly shifts legal costs to the tenant.

clause_types.name: Confession of Judgment Clause
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that allow landlords to confess judgment against tenants.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it denies tenants the right to defend themselves in court.

clause_types.name: Landlord Liability Exemption
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag any clause that exempts the landlord from liability for negligence.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it undermines tenant protections against landlord negligence.

clause_types.name: Excessive Security Deposit Requirements
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that impose excessive or illegal conditions on security deposits.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it violates state laws regarding security deposits.

clause_types.name: Discriminatory Lease Terms
key_indicators: refusal to rent based on protected class
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag any clauses that discriminate against tenants based on protected characteristics.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it violates the Fair Housing Act.

clause_types.name: Unreasonable Late Fees
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that impose excessive or unreasonable late fees.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it violates state laws regarding late fees.

clause_types.name: Prohibition of Guests or Roommates
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag any clause that prohibits tenants from having guests or roommates.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it restricts tenants' rights to have guests or family members.

clause_types.name: Waiver of Right to Legal Action
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that prevent tenants from taking legal action against landlords.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it denies tenants their right to seek legal remedies.

clause_types.name: Restriction on Emergency Services
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag any clause that restricts tenants from contacting emergency services.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it endangers tenant safety and well-being.

clause_types.name: Denial of Security Deposit Receipt
key_indicators: funds not held in separate account
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that deny tenants a receipt for their security deposit.
clause_types.description: This clause is illegal as it violates state laws requiring documentation of security deposits.

clause_types.name: Rent Increase Notification
key_indicators: landlord can increase rent with notice
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag clauses that allow landlords to increase rent without clear limits or notice.
clause_types.description: This clause is standard but should be negotiated for clarity and fairness.

clause_types.name: Restrictions on Subletting
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that impose strict restrictions on subletting.
clause_types.description: This clause is standard but may be negotiable for tenant flexibility.

clause_types.name: Lease Termination Notice Requirements
clause_types.what_to_flag: Flag clauses that outline the notice period for lease termination.
clause_types.description: This clause is fair as it provides clear expectations for both parties.

clause_types.name: Tenant Maintenance Responsibilities
clause_types.what_to_flag: Identify clauses that outline tenant maintenance responsibilities.
clause_types.description: This clause is fair as it establishes reasonable expectations for tenant upkeep.
